description: Section 4.1 row 1: Indicates whether the event is a new event firm-initiated correction (FRC) or a repair of a CAT error (RPR)
Section 4.1 row 2: Required when actionType is RPR. Must be blank when actionType is NEW
Section 2.3.3: Firm-assigned identifier formatted as <Event Date>_<firm ROE Identifier>. Unique per Event Date and CAT Reporter IMID
Section 6.1.5: The Message Type code (MENO, MEOR, MEOT etc) carried in the JSON 'type' field
Section 2.4.1: SRO-assigned IMID for the Industry Member
Section 4.1 row 6: Date and time the orderID was assigned
Section 4.1 row 7: Internal order ID. Unique within orderKeyDate CATReporterIMID and symbol
Section 2.4.3: Symbol of the stock in the symbology of the primary listing exchange
Section 4.1 row 9: Date/time of the event. Millisecond precision required when manualFlag is false
Section 4.1 row 10: True if the event was received or captured manually
Section 4.1 row 11: True if this is a duplicative electronic message of a manual event
Section 4.1 row 12: Time at which the manual event was systematized. Required when manualFlag is true and event is systematized
Section 4.1 row 13: orderKeyDate of the related manual order
Section 4.1 row 14: orderID of the related manual order. Required when electronicDupFlag is true
Section 4.1 row 15: Category of internal department unit or desk originating or receiving the order
Section 4.1 row 16: True if the order was originated in response to an RFQ or other solicitation
Section 4.1 row 17: For New Order events representing a response to an RFQ
Section 4.1 row 18: Side of the order
Section 4.1 row 19: Limit or trade price
Section 4.1 row 20: Order or trade quantity
Section 4.1 row 21: Minimum quantity of an order to be executed
Section 4.1 row 22: Type of order being submitted
Section 4.1 row 23: Time in Force
Section 4.1 row 24: Trading session(s) during which an order is eligible to trade
Section 4.1 row 25 / Section 4.3 row 28
Section 4.1 row 26: Customer/client display instruction flag
Section 2.4.2 / Appendix G: FDID of the account
Section 4.1 row 28: Beneficial owner type
Section 4.1 row 29 / 4.3 row 26: Routing party is an affiliate of the IM
Section 4.1 row 30: Identifier of the information barrier (FINRA Rule 5320.02)
Section 4.1 row 32: True if the trade is a result of a negotiation
Section 4.1 row 33: Indicates if the order is a representative order
Section 4.1 row 34: Sequence number assigned to the CAT event by the firm
Section 4.1 row 35: ATS display indicator
Section 4.1 row 36: Displayed price for this order
Section 4.1 row 37: Working price of the order
Section 4.1 row 38: Displayed quantity
Section 4.1 row 40 / 4.11.1 row 26: National best bid price at moment of receipt or trade
Section 4.1 row 41 / 4.11.1 row 27: NBB quantity
Section 4.1 row 42 / 4.11.1 row 28: NBO price
Section 4.1 row 43 / 4.11.1 row 29: NBO quantity
Section 4.1 row 44 / 4.11.1 row 30: Source of NBBO data
Section 4.1 row 45 / 4.11.1 row 31: Date/time NBBO was referenced
Section 4.1 row 46: Net price of the order when tied to stock
Section 4.1 row 47: Identifies if a Short Sale order event relies on the bona fide market making exception
Section 4.3 row 9: Used in mergers/acquisitions where prior firm orders are still open
Section 4.3 row 14: The IMID actually sending the route
Section 4.3 row 15: The destination IMID (or special value for foreign / non-CAT-reporting)
Section 4.3 row 16: Whether the destination is an exchange affiliated firm or other type
Section 4.3 row 17: ID assigned to the routed order by the IM
Section 4.3 row 18: Session ID used when routing the order
Section 4.3 row 27: Intermarket Sweep Order indicator
Section 4.3 row 29: True if the routed order was not accepted by the destination
Section 4.3 row 32 / 4.11.1 row 35: Order is related to a multi-leg order
Section 4.3 row 33: Paired order identifier when reporting two related orders
Section 4.3 row 36: Date and time the quoteID was assigned
Section 4.3 row 37: Required for Order Route events reported in response to a quote
Section 4.11.1 row 6: Date and time the tradeID was assigned
Section 4.11.1 row 7: Unique ID for this execution assigned by the executing IM
Section 4.11.1 row 12: True if the execution or allocation was cancelled
Section 4.11.1 row 13: Time at which the cancellation occurred
Section 4.11.1 row 18: Capacity in which the IM acted (PRINCIPAL/AGENT/etc)
Section 4.11.1 row 19: Unique tape identifier reported
Section 4.11.1 row 20: National securities exchange or transaction venue
Section 4.11.1 row 21: One-sided or two-sided trade indicator
Section 4.11.1 row 24: Reason a unique identifier could not be reported
Section 4.11.1 row 33: Clearing number of the IM's clearing firm
Section 4.11.1 row 34: Counterparty IMID to the trade
Section 4.13.1 row 6: Date and time the allocationID was assigned
Section 4.13.1 row 7: Internal allocation ID assigned by the IM
Section 4.13.2 row 8: Prior allocationKeyDate when a new allocationID is assigned
Section 4.13.2 row 9: Prior allocationID
Section 4.13.1 row 18: Trade date of the securities being allocated
Section 4.13.1 row 19: Settlement date
Section 4.13.1 row 20: Type of allocation (e.g. DVP DVPF)
Section 4.13.1 row 21: Required when allocationType is DVP or DVPF
Section 4.13.1 row 22: CRD number of related Introducing Broker
Section 4.13.1 row 23: FDID of the related New Order event if available
Section 4.13.1 row 24: Date/time the allocation instruction was received
Section 4.13.1 row 17: True if the account meets the institutional definition
CAIS Section 4.1: FDID of the ACCOUNT/RELATIONSHIP/ENTITYID being reported
CAIS Section 4.1: Unique reference to a single Customer Record per submission file
